state.next-action: Phase 43 context gathered (discuss mode). Phase 42.4 cleanup shipped end-to-end: snapshot lane leak fixed (42.4-04), command-skill/workflow normalization shipped (42.4-05), remaining canonical-skill dedupe + validator shipped (42.4-06), and proto-skill staging/install is now normalized so staged drafts live in `.planning/proto-skills/` with direct runtime install via `gad evolution install` before promotion (42.4-07, gad-183). Species-level `gad.json` → `species.json` rename completed (42.4-14): all 6 species files renamed in escape-the-dungeon + gad-explainer-video, build-site-data.mjs species scanner updated. `gad:eval-spawn` skill + slash command shipped (42.4-13): new canonical skill `skills/gad-eval-spawn/` wraps the existing `gad eval run --execute` EXEC.json spec, spawns a worktree-isolated `general-purpose` subagent with the hydrated prompt, writes a session marker under `.planning/.eval-runs/<runId>.json`, and preserves outputs via `gad eval preserve` before cleanup — plan/build seam per decision forge-09. Multi-root eval discovery shipped (42.4-12): `[[evals.roots]]` in `gad-config.toml` mirrors `[[planning.roots]]`; new helpers `getEvalRoots` / `listAllEvalProjects` / `resolveEvalProject` in `bin/gad.cjs` rewire every eval subcommand to walk the union of configured roots plus the implicit submodule default, with load-time duplicate-id detection; `apps/forge/evals/` registered as the first non-default root so forge can host its own evals outside the framework submodule. Forge proving-ground spec shipped (42.4-16): `apps/forge/.planning/plans/forge-proving-ground.md` defines PG-01..PG-09 observable pass criteria (build preserved, clean headless load, zero console.error, game root mounts, player renders, tilemap renders, input moves player, no unhandled rejections, probe runtime < 30s) with a 12-row historical comparison table retroactively scoring all ETD gad-species generations — 4 of 12 (v7/v8/v9/v10) have preserved builds, exactly 1 (v8) has an explicit SCORE.md "Build requirement gate PASSED" annotation, and PG-02..PG-08 are `?` across the board because no mechanical probe has ever run against an ETD build. DOG-02 in forge `REQUIREMENTS.xml` and phase 08 success criteria in forge `ROADMAP.xml` now cite the checklist. Project ⊇ Species inheritance contract shipped (42.4-15, decision gad-184): new `lib/eval-loader.cjs` exports `loadProject`/`loadSpecies`/`loadAllSpeciesRaw`/`loadResolvedSpecies`/`loadAllResolvedSpecies`/`mergeProjectSpecies`/`resolveInheritanceChain`; merge semantics are project defaults → `inherits_from` chain (deepest ancestor first) → target species with last-write-wins, arrays REPLACE (no concat), species-only fields (`inherits_from`, `dna`, species description) stay local and never back-propagate to project defaults, cycles throw with a clear error. Wired `bin/gad.cjs eval list` and `site/scripts/build-site-data.mjs scanEvalProjects` through the loader so CLI, site prebuild, and forge editor all see the same merged shape. Hermetic test suite at `tests/eval-loader-inheritance.test.cjs` green (7/7) covering (a) empty-species inheritance, (b) clean override, (c) species-only non-pollution, (d) chain resolution, (e) cycle detection, plus `loadAllResolvedSpecies` + `mergeProjectSpecies` purity spot checks. All five of the 42.4-12..16 framework gates blocking app-forge phase 01 are now landed; forge phase 01 can spawn.
